race.comment: KLOCKE (6) Zoustar colt from the good producing mare Sense Of Hite on debut for the Waller yard. Impressed in all his trials and look for him savaging the line. Hard to hold out. DOMINATOR (2) returns from a let-up after proving no match for Bangkok Hottie on debut with a fading ninth over 1100m at Randwick on April 25. Blinkers go on and should find this more to his liking. THE MACHINE GUN (12) is a Stay Inside colt from the stakes-winning mare Don'ttelltheboss on debut for Peter Snowden. Won a recent Gosford trial and draws well. ZEITGEIST (14) is a colt by Wootton Bassett making his first appearance for the Chris Waller stable. Place in both trials. Keep safe.
